Short CV

He completed his undergraduate education at Üsküdar University, Faculty of Communication, Visual Communication Design and Advertising Design and Communication. He has worked   with different sectors as a graphic and visual communication designer, photographer, editor, copywriter and art director. In 2022, he completed his master's degree at Kadir Has University, Department of Communication Sciences, New Media Program with a full scholarship. He continues his education at Yıldız Technical University Art and Design Doctorate Program. His research interests include 3D visualization (imaging-reconstruction), computer-aided generated imagery, and new media art.
